de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.communication

Class ExternalProcessLauncher

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.communication.ExternalProcessLauncher

  • public class ExternalProcessLauncher
extends java.lang.Object
    This class is responsible for starting external processes:
    1. It creates the process (stderr is merged to stdout).
    2. Creates the pipe that is used for communication.
    3. Starts the process and returns.
    Remark: Does not block the invoking thread.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ExternalProcessLauncher(SolverCommunication session, java.lang.String[] messageDelimiters)
      Creates the external process launcher.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Pipe getPipe() 
      void launch(java.lang.String[] command)
      Main procedure of the class.
      void stop()
      Stops the external process: In particular the pipe is closed and the process is destroyed.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExternalProcessLauncher

        public ExternalProcessLauncher(@Nonnull
                               SolverCommunication session,
                               @Nonnull
                               java.lang.String[] messageDelimiters)
        Creates the external process launcher.
        Parameters:
        session - the store for the messages send to and received from the process
        messageDelimiters - delimiters which separate the messages

    • Method Detail

      • launch

        public void launch(java.lang.String[] command)
            throws java.io.IOException
        Main procedure of the class. Starts the external process and connects the pipe to it. stderr and stdout of the process are merged.
        Parameters:
        command - command (program and arguments) which is used to start the external process
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs

      • stop

        public void stop()
        Stops the external process: In particular the pipe is closed and the process is destroyed.

      • getPipe

        public Pipe getPipe()
